# Visual Review

Section-by-section critique with Keep / Repair / Cut judgments. The output of this file is the priority-ordered fix list that the next build pass works through.

See `.claude/skills/award-website-os/references/49-visual-qa-red-team.md`.

## Header / nav

- Screenshot ref: <FILL IN>
- Working: <FILL IN>
- Not working: <FILL IN>
- Decision: Keep / Repair / Cut
- If Repair, specific task: <FILL IN>

- Decision: Keep / Repair / Cut

## Signature interaction

## Cross-cutting concerns

### Typography
<FILL IN — rhythm, scale, hierarchy, readability>

### Color
<FILL IN — usage of accent; restraint; contrast pass>

### Spacing / composition
<FILL IN — grid discipline; section rhythm>

### Motion
<FILL IN — does motion clarify or decorate?>

### Mobile-as-its-own-design
<FILL IN — distinct or stacked?>

### Detail consistency
<FILL IN — radii, shadows, icons, focus states>

## The "would this still make sense for a competitor" test

For each section, mark Y/N:

| Section | Could be pasted onto competitor unchanged? |
|---|---|
| Hero | <FILL IN — Y/N> |
| Section 2 | <FILL IN> |
| Section 3 | <FILL IN> |
| Footer | <FILL IN> |

Any "Y" must become a `Repair` task.
